title: SpinResponse
description: Successful response data object for POST /v1/spin (the `data` field inside the envelope). outcome.totalWin is the SOLE ACCOUNTING AUTHORITY — Thunder Blessing Slot Game

baseBet.description: Base bet amount in player's currency

totalBet.description: Actual amount debited: baseBet × 1 (normal), × 3 (extraBet only), × 100 (buyFeature only), × 300 (extraBet + buyFeature combined)

totalWin.description: Total win credited to wallet. SOLE ACCOUNTING AUTHORITY. 0 if no win.

newBalance.description: Player wallet balance after this spin (post-credit)

extraBetActive.description: true when Extra Bet (3× cost) is active for this spin

buyFeatureActive.description: true when Buy Feature (100× cost) is active for this spin

initialGrid.description: 5×3 initial grid before Cascade. Outer array = rows (0-indexed top to bottom), inner = columns (left to right).

finalGrid.description: Final grid after all Cascade steps. Row count equals finalRows.

finalRows.description: Final row count after Cascade expansion

thunderBlessingTriggered.description: true when Thunder Blessing was triggered (SC Scatter landed while at least one Lightning Mark existed)

thunderBlessingFirstHit.description: true when first Scatter hit occurred (all Lightning Mark positions converted to premium symbol)

thunderBlessingSecondHit.description: true when second Thunder Blessing hit applied (RNG < 0.40)

upgradedSymbol.description: Symbol all Lightning Mark positions were upgraded to on first hit. Null if Thunder Blessing was not triggered.

coinTossTriggered.description: true when grid reaches 6 rows AND final cascade step had at least one win

fgTriggered.description: true when Free Game sequence was entered (coinTossResult = HEADS)

fgMultiplier.description: Final FG multiplier reached in Coin Toss sequence. Null if FG was not triggered.

fgRounds.description: All FG rounds played (up to 5). Empty array if fgTriggered is false.

fgBonusMultiplier.description: Bonus multiplier drawn once at the START of the FG sequence before round 1. Null if FG not triggered.

totalFGWin.description: Sum of raw round wins across all FG rounds before multipliers. effectiveFGWin = totalFGWin × fgMultiplier × bonusMultiplier. Null if FG not triggered.

sessionFloorApplied.description: True if Buy Feature session floor (≥ 20× baseBet) was applied

sessionFloorValue.description: Floor guarantee: 20 × baseBet (buyFeature only) or 60 × baseBet (extraBet + buyFeature). Null if not a Buy Feature spin.

nearMissApplied.description: true when near-miss weighting was applied to the reel stop positions

rngSeed.description: Optional audit/replay seed; present only when LOG_RNG_VALUES=true. Omitted in production responses.

CascadeSequence.description: Complete cascade result. steps is non-empty when totalWin > 0.

grid.description: Grid state at the start of this cascade step

stepWin.description: Total win from all winLines in this cascade step

newLightningMarks.description: Positions that received Lightning Marks in this step

rows.description: Row count after this cascade step

paylineId.description: Payline identifier (1–25 at 3 rows; up to 57 at 6 rows)

symbolId.description: Winning symbol (Scatter SC does not produce win lines)

payout.description: Win amount for this payline in the player's currency

positions.description: All accumulated Lightning Mark positions (across all cascade steps)

marksConverted.description: Grid positions where Lightning Marks were converted to the upgraded symbol

convertedSymbol.description: Symbol all Lightning Mark positions were upgraded to on first hit

secondHitApplied.description: True if second hit (RNG < tbSecondHit probability of 0.40) was applied

FGRound.description: Single round within an FG sequence. bonusMultiplier is drawn once at FG start and is identical across all rounds in the sequence.

bonusMultiplier.description: Bonus multiplier drawn once at FG sequence start. Identical in all FGRound objects.

grid.description: Initial grid for this FG round (5×3 reset per round; Lightning Marks persist)

roundWin.description: Raw win for this FG round before multiplier application (for frontend display)

coinTossResult.description: Coin Toss result at end of this FG round. TAILS ends the FG sequence.
